ecosystem.name: Catena-X
ecosystem.description: A federated, sovereign automotive data ecosystem connecting OEMs, suppliers and service providers across the value chain under shared governance and interoperability standards.

governanceRules.title: Regulatory Alignment
governanceRules.description: All actors must operate within the boundaries set by the Regulator and applicable law.

governanceRules.title: Platform Access Rule
governanceRules.description: Defines conditions under which actors may access core platform orchestration services.

governanceRules.title: Marketplace Fairness Rule
governanceRules.description: Ensures non-discriminatory matching of supply and demand within the marketplace.

governanceRules.title: Governance Role Assignment
governanceRules.description: Every governance role must be assigned to an accountable actor at all times.

governanceRules.title: Customer Protection Rule
governanceRules.description: Protects customers from unfair contractual or service terms.

governanceRules.title: Dispute Escalation Rule
governanceRules.description: Defines the escalation path for unresolved inter-actor disputes.

governanceRules.title: Independent Audit Rule
governanceRules.description: Requires periodic independent governance and compliance audits.

governanceRules.title: Data Sovereignty Rule
governanceRules.description: Mandates data residency, access control and sovereignty-compliant handling.

governanceRules.title: Quality Certification Rule
governanceRules.description: Requires manufacturing quality certification before capacity is listed.

governanceRules.title: Interoperability Standard Rule
governanceRules.description: Requires adherence to shared technical and data interoperability standards.

governanceRules.title: Circularity & Sustainability Rule
governanceRules.description: Requires end-of-life material recovery and circular closure reporting.

governanceRules.title: Workforce Qualification Rule
governanceRules.description: Requires minimum workforce skills and training certification.

governanceRules.title: Cyber-Resilience Rule
governanceRules.description: Requires baseline cybersecurity controls across platform-critical actors.

governanceRules.title: Capacity Redundancy Rule
governanceRules.description: Requires qualification of alternate capacity providers to avoid single points of failure.

ecosystem.name: Xometry AI-Native Manufacturing Marketplace
ecosystem.industry: On-Demand / Custom Manufacturing (Aerospace, Defense, Automotive, Medical, Industrial)
ecosystem.country: United States (global network across 12+ countries via Xometry Europe)
ecosystem.platform: Xometry Marketplace — AI Instant Quoting Engine + Thomasnet.com
ecosystem.description: A real, publicly documented Manufacturing-as-a-Service ecosystem built from Xometry, Inc.'s (Nasdaq: XMTR) SEC filings, investor disclosures and verifiable public sources. Xometry is an AI-native marketplace, founded in 2013 and public since its June 2021 IPO, that matches enterprise buyers to a vetted global network of manufacturing suppliers via a proprietary machine-learning instant-quoting engine. FY2025 marketplace revenue was $686.6M across 81,821 active buyers and 4,996 active suppliers. The ecosystem includes its 2019 acquisition of Shift GmbH (Munich, now Xometry Europe) and its 2021 acquisition of the Thomas/Thomasnet.com industrial sourcing marketplace ($300M). All actors, certifications (ISO 9001:2015, AS9100D, ISO 13485:2016, IATF 16949:2016, ITAR registration, CMMC Level 2) and dependency structures below are grounded in company disclosures, SEC filings and industry press — no fictional actors have been added.

actors.name: Xometry, Inc.
capabilities: AI-powered Instant Quoting Engine (ML-based pricing & routing)
Cloud-based Manufacturing Execution System for suppliers

actors.name: Xometry Europe (formerly Shift GmbH)
resources: ~1,000+ European manufacturing partner network (at Dec 2019 acquisition)

actors.name: Thomas (Thomasnet.com)
capabilities: Digital marketing & data services for sellers

actors.name: Vetted Manufacturing Partner Network
actors.role: Capacity Provider Network (CNC, 3D Printing, Injection Molding, Sheet Metal)
resources: Only ~35% of applicants pass Xometry's quality-control vetting test order

actors.name: Enterprise OEM Buyers (BMW, Bosch, Dell, GE et al.)
ISO / SAE International / IATF — Quality & Industry Standards Consortium
U.S. Directorate of Defense Trade Controls (DDTC)
Freight & Parcel Carrier Network (UPS, FedEx, DHL, USPS)
